subcodes.first_line: O My dear friend! When the rays of the Morn of Guidance shed their effulgence from the horizon of truth, the luminous mind [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سودیکم دوستم پرتو صباح هدایت افق حقیقتدن بارقه نثار هدایت اولنجه ضمیر منیر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @love as fire, @being a source of light; guidance
